I will extract 5-8 specific policy keywords from that text and return a comma-separated list.

### Random Environmental Policy Text

The government introduced new regulations to meet the National Clean Air Programme (NCAP) targets. This included a reduction in particulate matter (PM2.5) by 20-30% within the next five years. The policy implemented the following measures: 

*   Strict emission norms for vehicles
*   Increased usage of clean energy sources
*   Implementation of scrubbers in industrial facilities
*   Mandatory use of compressed natural gas (CNG) in public transport
*   Raising awareness about air pollution among citizens
*   Development of green corridors and smart grids
